user.title: Set up Eufy Vacuum Manager
user.description: Pick the vacuum entity this integration should manage. The Vacuum field is optional during initial setup — you can leave it blank and fill it in later via Configure → Options.

error.no_rooms_selected: Please select at least one room to create.

abort.already_configured: Eufy Vacuum Manager is already configured.

init.title: Eufy Vacuum Manager Settings
init.description: Pick the vacuum entity this integration should manage. Changing the Vacuum value reloads the integration so the new vacuum's panel appears in the sidebar.

onboarding_required.title: Room setup required — {vacuum_name} Map {map_id}
onboarding_required.description: Rooms on map **{map_id}** for **{vacuum_name}** have not been set up yet. Click **Fix** to select which rooms to create and set their floor types.
